features.description: Master feature. Create + version + publish forms + collect submissions.
Emailed resume-session link so guardians can pause + finish a long form. Requires notifications channel.
Locale-scoped label bundles. Each FormVersion carries the label bundle for every locale in Form.locales_available.
Medical clearance PDFs + doctor letters. Encrypted at rest via AnswerCipher.
Athlete photo + consent form combined field type.
Waiver signature capture (draw or type). Signed data URL stored on submission.
Show/hide fields based on prior answers (e.g. show medical section only if 'has allergies' = true).
Break long forms into sections with progress indicator. Enterprise + long medical questionnaires.
Form publishes to `/forms/{signature}` on the tenant's central + tenant hosts. Signed non-enumerable URL.
Embed the form on the tenant's own website via a signed iframe URL. Enterprise.
Capture utm_source / utm_medium / utm_campaign on submission. Feeds growth/attribution.
Auto-email PDF receipt to submitter on completion.
Invisible honeypot field + submission-timing heuristic. Free bot defense before touching a CAPTCHA.
Add a CAPTCHA challenge on high-abuse forms. Enterprise.
Third-party apps (Lane 2 per ADR 0025) may contribute custom field types via #[AsFormFieldType]. Enterprise + Marketplace launch.
